title: The Sikkim University Act, 2006
full_text: The Sikkim University Act, 2006 सिक्‍किम विश्‍वविद्यालय अधिनियम, 2006 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 200710 Act Number: 10 Enactment Date: 2007-01-10 Act Year: 2007 Short Title: The Sikkim University Act, 2006 Hindi Title: सिक्‍किम विश्‍वविद्यालय अधिनियम, 2006 Long Title: An Act to establish and incorporate a teaching and affiliating University in the State of Sikkim and to provide for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Education Department: Department of Higher Education Enforcement Date: 02-07-2007 Notification: 2nd July 2007, vide notification No. S.O. 1053(E), dated 29th June, 2007, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Sikkim University Act, 2006 Show all section Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Establishment of the University. Section 4. Objects of the University. Section 5. Powers of the University. Section 6. Jurisdiction. Section 7. University open to all classes, castes and creed. Section 8. The Visitor. Section 9. The Chief Rector. Section 10. Officers of the University. Section 11. The Chancellor. Section 12. The Vice-Chancellor. Section 13. The Pro-Vice Chancellor. Section 14. The Deans of Schools. Section 15. The Registrar. Show Related Subordinates Section 16. The Finance Officer. Section 17. The Controller of Examinations. Section 18. The Librarian. Section 19. Other officers. Section 20. Authorities of the University. Section 21. The Court. Section 22. The Executive Council. Section 23. The Academic Council. Section 24. The College Development Council. Section 25. The Board of Studies. Section 26. The Finance Committee. Section 27. Other authorities of the University. Section 28. Powers to make Statutes. Show Related Subordinates Section 29. Statutes how to be made. Section 30. Power to make Ordinances. Show Related Subordinates Section 31. Regulations. Show Related Subordinates Section 32. Annual report. Section 33. Annual accounts. Section 34. Returns and information. Section 35. Conditions of service of employees. Section 36. Procedure of appeal and arbitration in disciplinary cases against students. Section 37. Right to appeal. Section 38. Provident and pension funds. Section 39. Disputes as to constitution of authorities and bodies. Section 40. Filling of casual vacancies. Section 41. Proceedings of authorities or bodies not invalidated by vacancies. Section 42. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 43. Mode of proof of University record. Section 44. Power to remove difficulties. Section 45. Statutes, Ordinances and Regulations to be published in the Official Gazette and to be laid before Parliament. Section 46. Transitional provisions. Schedule 1.
